slides.headline: Full transformation execution spans 30 months with value captured progressively from Month 6

milestones.label: Program Launch
milestones.detail: PMO established; quick-win initiatives kicked off; pricing optimization live

milestones.label: Foundation Complete
milestones.detail: Customer data platform deployed; warehouse consolidation Phase 1 done

milestones.label: Scale & Expand
milestones.detail: Unified commerce platform go-live; AI demand forecasting in 100 stores

milestones.label: Full Deployment
milestones.detail: All 5 mega-DCs operational; digital channel at 25% penetration

milestones.label: Steady State
milestones.detail: Run-rate savings of $450M achieved; operating model fully embedded

slides.source: McKinsey implementation roadmap; validated with Steering Committee
